tiles.title: HTTP Status Mix
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE(code, 'unknown') AS code, COUNT(*) AS requests FROM $metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name = 'traefik_entrypoint_requests_total' AND entrypoint IS NOT NULL GROUP BY code ORDER BY requests DESC

tiles.title: Methods
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE(method, 'unknown') AS method, COUNT(*) AS requests FROM $metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name = 'traefik_entrypoint_requests_total' GROUP BY method ORDER BY requests DESC

tiles.title: Protocols
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE(protocol, 'unknown') AS protocol, COUNT(*) AS requests FROM $metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name = 'traefik_entrypoint_requests_total' GROUP BY protocol ORDER BY requests DESC

tiles.title: Top Services by Samples
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE(service, 'unknown') AS service, COUNT(*) AS samples, MAX(p_timestamp) AS last_seen FROM $metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name = 'traefik_service_requests_total' GROUP BY service ORDER BY samples DESC LIMIT 15

tiles.title: Certificates by CN
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE(cn, 'unknown') AS cn, COUNT(*) AS certs FROM $metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name = 'traefik_tls_certs_not_after' GROUP BY cn ORDER BY certs DESC

tiles.title: Certificate Expiry
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT cn, MAX(data_point_value) AS not_after_unix, MAX(p_timestamp) AS last_seen FROM $metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name = 'traefik_tls_certs_not_after' GROUP BY cn ORDER BY not_after_unix ASC

tiles.title: Access Logs
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM $logs_dataset WHERE "k8s.namespace.name" = 'traefik' AND "k8s.container.name" = 'traefik'

tiles.title: 5xx Access Logs
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM $logs_dataset WHERE "k8s.namespace.name" = 'traefik' AND "k8s.container.name" = 'traefik' AND body LIKE '%" 5__ %'

tiles.title: Logs Over Time
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT date_bin(INTERVAL '1 minute', p_timestamp, TIMESTAMP '1970-01-01T00:00:00') AS time_bucket, COUNT(*) AS value FROM $logs_dataset WHERE "k8s.namespace.name" = 'traefik' AND "k8s.container.name" = 'traefik' GROUP BY time_bucket ORDER BY time_bucket

tiles.title: Access Logs by Status
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE(array_element(regexp_match(body, '\"([A-Z]+) ([^ ]+) HTTP/[0-9.]+\" ([0-9]{3})'), 3), 'unknown') AS status_code, COUNT(*) AS logs FROM $logs_dataset WHERE "k8s.namespace.name" = 'traefik' AND "k8s.container.name" = 'traefik' GROUP BY status_code ORDER BY logs DESC

tiles.title: Access Logs by Method
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE(array_element(regexp_match(body, '\"([A-Z]+) ([^ ]+) HTTP/[0-9.]+\" ([0-9]{3})'), 1), 'unknown') AS method, COUNT(*) AS logs FROM $logs_dataset WHERE "k8s.namespace.name" = 'traefik' AND "k8s.container.name" = 'traefik' GROUP BY method ORDER BY logs DESC

tiles.title: Recent 5xx Access Logs
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT p_timestamp, "k8s.pod.name" AS pod, array_element(regexp_match(body, '\"([A-Z]+) ([^ ]+) HTTP/[0-9.]+\" ([0-9]{3})'), 1) AS method, array_element(regexp_match(body, '\"([A-Z]+) ([^ ]+) HTTP/[0-9.]+\" ([0-9]{3})'), 2) AS path, array_element(regexp_match(body, '\"([A-Z]+) ([^ ]+) HTTP/[0-9.]+\" ([0-9]{3})'), 3) AS status_code, body FROM $logs_dataset WHERE "k8s.namespace.name" = 'traefik' AND "k8s.container.name" = 'traefik' AND body LIKE '%" 5__ %' ORDER BY p_timestamp DESC LIMIT 50

tiles.title: Traefik Metric Inventory
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT metric_name, COUNT(*) AS samples, MIN(p_timestamp) AS first_seen, MAX(p_timestamp) AS last_seen FROM $metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name LIKE 'traefik_%' GROUP BY metric_name ORDER BY metric_name

tiles.title: Traefik Pods
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT "k8s.pod.name" AS pod, COUNT(DISTINCT metric_name) AS metrics, MAX(p_timestamp) AS last_seen FROM $metrics_dataset WHERE "k8s.namespace.name" = 'traefik' GROUP BY "k8s.pod.name" ORDER BY pod
